author: doll-agent
content: MaskedArray <-> Arrow null-bitmap interop is not implemented in this batch. The path forward: build a null bitmap from MaskedArray.mask() (true → null), pass it as the Arrow validity buffer when constructing PrimitiveArray, and the reverse — read the validity buffer of an incoming Arrow array into the mask. The existing prim_to_dyn helper in extras.rs panics on nulls, marking the contract clearly. Implementing this needs ferray-ma to be a soft dependency of ferray-numpy-interop (currently it isn't), or a pure-data Vec<bool> mask interface. Stays open as the documented next step. Tracks #556.
